Bringing amazing solutions together Dive Deeper Contact us

ABOUT

Ar3Tek is an IT company, providing a wide spectrum of IT services including Software Development, Research and Development, IT Consultancy, Quality Assurance as Service (Automated and Manual), Cloud Services and Migrations, Digital Transformation, Projects/Products Management and Support, etc. 

Ar3Tek, has a global organizational structure with headquarters in Los Angeles, CA, USA and a technical team in Yerevan, Armenia.

Local managers (Administrative and Project Managers, Dev. and QA Leads) manage primary engineering and development teams and report to the senior management (Director of Operations and Development). The engineering team is composed of full-time staff (Web/Mobile Developers, Cloud/System Architects, DevOps and QA Engineers). Additional staff members include UI/UX designers, SEO/ASO, and Digital Marketing.

Ar3Tek localizes project managers

to define the necessary engineering positions needed during the project research and estimation and requirements phase then the special expertise required during the development phase all the way through to the project completion and sign off. Ensuing that project milestones and management reporting is provided to hit pre-defined / pre-estimated time and budget limits.
Every project component is assigned to one of the teams depending on the needed experience.

SERVICES

Ar3Tek provides the following services.

STRATEGY

Consulting with our clients to prioritize requirements/features/timelines to achieve their goals & target budget.

DESIGN

Designers will create wireframes, mockups and prototypes as needed to iterate to a finished product with client approvals.

ARCHITECTURE

We create systems/applications design and technical requirements to ensure best practices are used.

PLANNING

You can choose to manage our developers directly or leverage our project management team.

DEVELOPMENT

With software architectural expertise, full stack development knowledge and industry competency, Ar3Tek customizes, develops and migrates software solutions.

CLOUD

Selection, setup, development, and maintenance of cloud strategy and infrastructure. Optimized for high availability (HA), reliability, security and optimization. In addition, ensuring lower TCO and fast product to market timeline.

QUALITY CONTROL

All software applications developed by Ar3Tek have integral testing and code reviews throughout development. Software release is not done without a thorough testing process and signoffs.

MAINTENANCE & SUPPORT

Maintenance and Support is critical when it comes to your project success. We offer a customizable plan to accommodate your go forward needs.

Years of existence and expertise

Ar3Tek composed teams of highly skilled professionals in R&D, Software Development, QA, Digital Marketing and SEO and so on. The following list includes but not limited to the services and capacities Ar3Tek has and puts in everyday practice delivering enterprise level quality digital products to its customers.

Contact Us

Web/Mobile Application Development

Ar3Tek utilizes modern cutting-edge technologies and tools to produce highly efficient, secure, dynamic large and mid-size web applications/services/portals, websites and IT solutions.

 

Our team has advanced capacities of enterprise-level iOS and Android applications development using modern programming SDKs and toolkits.

 

Our team has vast experience developing B2B web/mobile applications for enterprise customers, managed by the leading MDM and enterprise distribution platforms (including Blackberry Dynamics).

1 B2B applications

2 Social applications

3 Business management applications

4 ERP/CRM applications

5 E-Commerce applications

6 Multimedia applications

7 AR and ML applications

8 Blockchain applications

9 Others

Quality Assurance

Highly professional QA team provides thorough manual and automated QA testing of web and mobile applications based on specialized solutions. For the manual/exploratory testing and issues reporting layered testing maps are being developed for each case and product story.

Project and Product Management

Ar3Tek utilizes Agile Project Management methodologies for all R&D flows and uses modern cloud-based solutions (Jira, Trello, etc.) for tracking and reporting. All the processes, including R&D, are being conducted in accordance with the technical and management requirements of the customer: based on detailed project documentation (technical requirement documentation, UI/UX mocks or final designs, time/value estimation and valuation documentation, development and reporting plans, etc.).

 

Agile development models (Scrum, Kanban) ensure dynamic control and responsiveness of R&D processes, sign-offs and handovers. Our Project Managers provide mentioned above services also to the customers’ teams as contracted consultants.

Digital Marketing, SEO and ASO

Ar3Tek provides digital marketing and SEO services through its very experienced partners, having more than eight years of expertise working with the US based clients.

 

The list of services including but not limited to SEO (Search Engine Optimization), ASO (App Store Optimization), PPC (Pay Per Click Management) in Google AdWords and Bing Ads, Social Media Marketing and Affiliate marketing for a number of large to small enterprise and private clients.

CLIENTS

Passion for creating state-of-the-art digital projects and guiding engaging

CONTACT US

Send us a message



    Article in Enterprise Times, Armenia and specifically its capital Yerevan is listed in 10 Best Cities for Tech Career Opportunities. Research shows that by 2025, the need for programmers in Armenia will have tripled to 30,000. This is largely due to the ever-increasing innovation in their tech sector. A sector that is growing at an annual rate of 20% and shows no signs of slowing down. 

    Many other studies, conducted by the World Bank, UN and other international agencies clearly indicate the constant growth as in the IT sector in Armenia, so in demand and interest displayed by the foreign businesses and investors. 

    In 2019 Armenia hosted the World Congress on Information Technology and yet again displayed to the leading international IT companies that the R & D capacities are continuously growing and this was reflected and got in deep coverage by big media agencies.

    WCIT 2019

    © Ar3tek 2021
